allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: M3-004 is pushed. This scope implements M3-005 worker-side dry-run estimates and CUDA OOM isolation only: config/dataset materialization, bounded probe metrics, dry-run report JobEvents, CUDA OOM error_class mapping, and worker-isolation tests. It does not implement benchmark, export, API, DB schema, or FE mockup work.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M3-005 only: dry_run mode for CUDA/MLX wrappers, bounded short-probe report fields, no adapter manifest on dry-run, CUDA OOM mapping to error_class=CUDA_OOM with sanitized JobEvent(error), and worker-isolation evidence via DB/API-monitor-safe tests. Keep API, DB schema, benchmark, export, FE mockup, and docs/spec edits out of scope.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, M3 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M3-005, HARDWARE_DOCTOR dry-run section, ARCHITECTURE wrapper obligations, existing CUDA/MLX wrappers, TrainingStore, and M3-004 checkpoint resume tests.
phase_notes.build: Implemented dry-run report runtime helper, TrainingStore dry-run terminal helper, CUDA/MLX dry-run branches, CUDA OOM classifier, and focused tests.
phase_notes.check: Passed task JSON, py_compile, focused dry-run/OOM pytest, wrapper/checkpoint regressions, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, and diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Pending: commit implementation, update WORKING closeout, and push after closeout commit.
